summary_from_search: 37-42 analysts cover NVDA. Average PT ranges from $268-$275 across sources ($270.73 MarketBeat, $272.08 Public, $274.38 Wall St., $268.61 consensus). Range: low $195 / high $360. Stock at ~$208 implies ~29% upside to consensus. 57/60 Buy or Strong Buy.
